channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 8 Ways to Get the Protein You Need
Meghan Trainor on Building Confidence and Healthy Habits
item.description: Meghan shares how she’s tuning out criticism, prioritizing her health, and building habits that help her feel stronger than ever.

item.title: AI's a suck up. Research shows how it flatters and suggests we're not to blame
item.description: The AI models and chatbots that we interact with tend to affirm our feelings and viewpoints — more so than people do, with potentially worrisome conse...

item.title: What Happens to Your Body When You Drink Enough Water
How mosquitoes — and malaria — helped shape the whereabouts of early humankind
item.description: A new study looks at an unexpected force that played a critical role in shaping the lives of ancient humans.

item.title: Two startlingly different views on long-awaited data on America's anti-HIV efforts
item.description: After a year without data, the State Department released figures on PEPFAR, the program launched by George W. Bush and credited with saving millions o...

item.title: Trump administration eases rules on some marijuana categories. Here's what to know
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche said he is immediately moving medical marijuana from Schedule I to Schedule III, which includes drugs like ketami...

item.title: Is This The Part Of Endometriosis Treatment We’ve Been Missing?
item.description: Research reveals how endometriosis changes the brain.

item.title: This Easy Outdoor Habit May Be The Secret To Feeling Less Lonely
item.description: New research suggests that solo time outdoors, not socializing, may be the key to easing loneliness.

item.title: How Women Can Prevent Injury While Weightlifting In Their 40s & Beyond
item.description: Because certain fractures become much more common in perimenopause.

item.title: Cravings, Fatigue, & Mood Swings? Here's What To Eat Each Phase Of Your Cycle
item.description: And permission to eat the carbs (and the chocolate!)

item.title: In Need Of Sun, Rest & Relaxation? (Who Isn't?) Try This Hotspot
item.description: Welcome to Playa del Carmen, Mexico's premier resort destination, located in the heart of the Riviera Maya.

item.title: Gene therapy for a rare type of deafness shows lasting results
item.description: Researchers say a gene therapy allowed deaf children and adults as old as 32 to hear for the first time. The benefits have persisted for more than two...
